nodes.description: Sideshow presents the Premium BTS Logo: Seoul Edition, a special edition licensed BTS collectible inspired by the beauty and majesty of South Korea.  Measuring 7' tall and 4.5' wide, the Premium BTS Logo: Seoul Edition takes the iconic shape of the 21st-century pop icons' logo, visualized as a set of doors opening outward to possibility, and incorporates vibrant symbols of BTS' home country. These symbols include the mugunghwa (or the rose of Sharon), the silhouette of a Korean red pine, patterns from postal stamps, a Siberian tiger, elements from the South Korean flag, and imagery from the Namsan Mountain.  The Premium BTS Logo: Seoul Edition also features the ARMY symbol on one side of the statue. These symbols exist in harmony, bringing together past and present in one elegant design.  Celebrate the talent and national origin of RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook when you bring home the Premium BTS Logo: Seoul Edition to your shelf today!
nodes.name: Premium BTS Logo: Seoul Edition

nodes.description: Now you know why they call me Dirty Harry: every dirty job that comes along.   Sideshow presents the Harry Callahan Sixth Scale Figure, joining the Clint Eastwood Legacy Collection as a celebration of the actor's extensive career in film.  Based on Clint Eastwood's appearance in the action-thriller film Dirty Harry, the Harry Callahan Sixth Scale Figure features a carefully crafted portrait with the actor's iconic scowl, perfect for staring down the criminals in your collection. This essential neo-noir antihero also wears a custom-tailored fabric costume including a shirt, pants, a burgundy vest, a striped tie, a belt, a herringbone jacket with elbow patches, and a shoulder holster that fits beneath the jacket.  The Harry Callahan Sixth Scale Figure is articulated to allow for numerous display options utilizing the accompanying additional hands and accessories. Callahan comes prepared for the job with a police badge, a wristwatch, and a .44 magnum pistol which fits into his shoulder holder. The figure also comes with seven hands in total, including a pair of fists, a pair of relaxed hands, a right pistol-holding hand, a left pistol-supporting hand, and a right hand for holding his badge. Pose this police inspector in dramatic and dynamic stances to recreate your favorite Clint Eastwood movie moments on your shelf.  You've gotta ask yourself one question — if you feel lucky, be sure to bring home the Harry Callahan Sixth Scale Figure from Sideshow's Clint Eastwood Legacy Collection today.
nodes.name: Harry Callahan

nodes.description: When answers aren't available locally, I can go looking elsewhere.   Sideshow presents the Ghost-Spider Premium Format™ Figure, a sensational Marvel collectible swinging in from across the Multiverse.  The Ghost-Spider Premium Format Figure measures 23.75 tall and 12 wide as Gwen Stacy swings over the bright New York City skyline. The unique forced perspective base gives a spider's eye view of the Big Apple, complete with traffic lights easily bypassed by web-slinging, as well as a billboard advertising the services of Earth-65's more malicious Matt Murdock. While she's on the move, Gwen is video chatting with an unmasked Miles Morales on her phone — signal strength in the Spider-Verse can't be beat!  Inspired by the heroine's iconic appearance in Marvel Comics, the polystone Ghost-Spider Premium Format figure is fully sculpted and includes her white and pink masked portrait to hide her identity. Her costume features dynamic paint applications to highlight the colors of Gwen's signature white, black, pink, and teal suit, even down to the dirt on the soles of her stylized shoes. Her backpack has a pair of drumsticks inside the pocket, completing her unique style. Whether she's headed to band practice or the scene of a crime, Ghost-Spider will rock your world — and your collection.  The Exclusive Edition of the Ghost-Spider Premium Format Figure includes an alternate unmasked portrait that reveals her secret identity to the city. Send a selfie to Spider-Man or let Gwen feel the breeze through her blonde hair with this exclusive display option.  Drop a line across the Spider-Verse and bring home the Ghost-Spider Premium Format Figure for your web of Spider-Man collectibles today.
nodes.name: Ghost-Spider

nodes.description: The Batman movie has conquered the theaters worldwide! Beneath the tactical gear and eye black, the Caped Crusader is roaming the streets of Gotham City on the Batcycle - the sleekest mode of transport at night. As a continuation of The Batman collection, Sideshow and Hot Toys is thrilled to introduce the Batcycle Sixth Scale Accessory that allows fans to race through the city.  Based on the vehicle seen in The Batman movie, the one-sixth scale Batcycle collectible vehicle is recreated with extreme precision and fine painting applications, measures 42cm in length, features LED light-up function design on the head and tail lights, adjustable-degree handlebar, rotatable rubber wheels given a realistic tread pattern, also highly-accurate mechanical details showcased on the engine, frame, dashboard, and exhaust, comes with display bases.  The Batcycle Sixth Scale Accessory will certainly bring your DC Comics display onto a whole new level!
nodes.name: Batcycle

nodes.description: Sideshow and Capcom are excited to present the Valstrax Creator's Model Collectible Figure!  From the exciting video game franchise Monster Hunter, this Elder Dragon stands over 8.5' tall with his large muscular wings and jet-like flames already primed for a high-speed, powerful attack.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Valstrax Creator's Model

nodes.description: 'My road forward has been a muddy one. Slick with blood and tears, but we can reach its end together.' - Eivor  Sideshow and PureArts present Eivor Varinsdottir, also known as the Wolf-Kissed, brought to life with this incredibly detailed Assassin's Creed Valhalla Eivor Sixth Scale Figure. Born of fire and blood, Eivor's leadership and battle prowess is unmatched, delivering glory and riches in every raid.  Featuring our latest generation of articulated body, Eivor includes an arsenal of accessories and weapons, hyperdetailed clothing and sculpt, and a custom Assassin's Creed Valhalla display stand.
nodes.name: Eivor

nodes.description: Sideshow and Capcom are excited to present the Tigrex (Re-Pro) Creator's Model Collectible Figure!  From the exciting video game franchise Monster Hunter, this colorful wyvern stands almost 8' tall with his large muscular wings and mouth open, ready to attack.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Tigrex (Re-Pro) Creator's Model

nodes.description: Sideshow and Incendium LLC are thrilled to present Dio's iconic and demonic mascot, Murray!  Murray, AKA Murralsee, an ancient being as old as the earth itself! While living in a cave, he consumed a potion that let him slumber as eons passed. When Murray awoke in a new era, he met and befriended Ronnie James Dio. Ronnie misheard his name and mistakenly dubbed him Murray. As their friendship grew, Murray would tell Dio stories from ancient days, with these tales becoming the inspiration for many Dio songs!  Now you too can gain inspiration from this immortal legend with this EPIC Art Print by Comic Illustrator Kyle Hotz! Limited to 150 pieces worldwide, this is one print you don't want to sleep on!
nodes.name: Dio: Murray

nodes.description: Sideshow and Incendium LLC are thrilled to present to all you horror fans out there, 'The Creep' Glow-In-The-Dark Portrait!  A note from the ghoulishly grand team at Incendium:  Celebrating the launch of Creepshow on Shudder, and coming soon to AMC, we teamed up with the legendary artist, director, and all-around horror maestro Greg Nicotero!  Utilizing Greg's original production photography as reference, we commissioned artist Carlos Dattoli to develop a full portrait under a blood moon!  We are proud to present an officially licensed Creepshow 'The Creep' Glow-In-The-Dark Portrait.
nodes.name: 'The Creep’ Glow-In-The-Dark Portrait

nodes.description: Sideshow and Capcom are excited to present the Lux: Lady of Luminosity Figure Pen Collectible Figure!  From the competitive and popular video game League of Legends, this mage stands over 8.5' tall in an iconic and recognizable pose! This figure fits just as well in a collection room or at a desk, doubling as a pen once removed from the base.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Lux: The Lady of Luminosity Figure Pen

nodes.description: I was about to ask you — what is your greatest wish?   From the popular game, Genshin Impact comes a Nendoroid of the Windborne Bard, Venti!  He comes with three face plates including a winking face, a relaxed face with closed eyes, and a smiling face. Optional parts include his wooden lyre, Der Frühling, as well as the Skyward Harp bow, allowing you to recreate the battle scenes from the game.  Venti is just as cute as ever in adorable Nendoroid size, so be sure to add him to your collection today!
nodes.name: Venti Nendoroid

nodes.description: Sideshow and Paladone are excited to present the Friday the 13th Jason Mask Light!  During the events of Friday the 13th Part III, Jason Voorhees takes a hockey mask from a victim to hide his face as he continues his killing spree. It is the design of that iconic mask that has been used for this amazing light.  Standing 8.6' tall, this awesome Friday the 13th Mask Light can be powered by either the USB cable that is included, or for complete portability you can use three (3) AAA batteries (not included). Plus, it can be used as a free-standing light or mounted to the wall.  This Mask Light is perfect for any Friday the 13th or horror movie fan, so don't miss your chance to add this to your horror collection today!
nodes.name: Friday the 13th Jason Mask Light

nodes.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM present the Pasty's Fight Fatty Alli Figurine!  This hand-painted on resin figurine by Animal Planet x Manas S+U+M stands approximately 5'.   Add this statue to your art collection today!
nodes.name: Pasty's Fight Fatty Alli

nodes.description: 'Don't worry your pretty little head about the future, it's all fine......'  Sideshow and Incendium LLC are proud to present the Better Without You Fine Art Lithograph Print!  This limited edition flocked lithograph employs a variety of custom printing techniques including a flocking texture inspired by 70's blacklight posters and printed on a pearlescent stock.  This officially licensed Evanescence art print celebrates the forthcoming 'Better Without You' from their latest album The Bitter Truth which has been adapted into one of the stories from the Comic Anthology 'Echoes from the Void', and incorporates iconography and symbolism drawn from the single. A glimpse of things to come...  Music fans and Art lovers, be sure to add this dreamy print to your Evanescence gallery today!
nodes.name: Better Without You

nodes.description: Sideshow and Incendium LLC are proud to present the Evanescence Fine Art Print!  This officially licensed art print celebrates their latest album, The Bitter Truth, which has been adapted into one of the stories from the Comic Anthology 'Echoes from the Void' and incorporates iconography and symbolism drawn from the album. A glimpse of things to come...  Music fans and Art lovers, be sure to add this dreamy print to your Evanescence gallery today!
nodes.name: Evanescence

nodes.description: Sideshow and Brandlite are proud to present the Batman Vengeance (2) LED Mini-Poster Light.  DC Comics LED Illuminated Poster Signs bring your favorite character to life with brightly lit inkjet print, embedded in a solid slimline Acrylic (PMMA) body.  The high-end DC posters illuminate the graphic and have a unique 'neon-style' edge glow that adds a magic atmosphere to any room in the house!  The LED sign is both safe and economical to use. For Indoor Use. Wall-mounted or suspended from the ceiling.  Add to your Batman collection today!
nodes.name: Batman Vengeance (2) LED Mini-Poster Light

nodes.description: We're thrilled to announce the latest addition to our line of officially licensed high-end collectibles -- a limited edition Sword Of Omens Prop Replica from the iconic 1980's cartoon series, ThunderCats.  It requires a fair degree of artistic interpretation, working hand in hand with the licensor, to take 2D drawings created for animation or toy sculpts, both of which were intended for a less detailed execution, and realize them as fully developed and full-sized real-world items.  One such artistic judgment involves determining the size of a 1:1 scale replica for an animated character. The wielder of the Sword Of Omens, Lion-O, has no official height, so the replica, which measures 41 inches (104 cm) in length, has been scaled to the proportions of an adult human standing 6.2 (1.9m) tall.  Our replica sword is set in an open design and features a full-tang stainless steel blade with a mirror chrome finish, a cast metal hilt with acrylic inserts, and enamel detailing. A red imitation gemstone is inset into the pommel.  Each replica also includes a numbered, wall-hanging wood display and a certificate of authenticity booklet.  The Sword of Omens is a must-have for all ThunderCats fanatics! Add to your collection today!  CARE & CLEANING:  The blade should be polished with a soft dry cloth after a handling, stubborn grime/fingerprints can be removed with a weak solution of mild dish-soap and water applied with a damp cloth, dried and polished off with a soft dry cloth.  The blade has a mirror-polish finish. Do not scrub it. Do not use any chemical cleaner, abrasive polishes or homemade cleaners. (such as backing soda, vinegar or ammonia.)  The Eye of Thundera is acrylic and should only be cleaned with specialist acrylic cleaners and polishes, great care should be taken not to scratch either of the acrylic domes.  The entire replica will benefit from the occasional light dusting with a feather duster, antistatic dusting wand or canned air duster.  Always remove the rep
nodes.name: The Sword of Omens

nodes.description: Sideshow and Enesco present the Sorcerer Mickey Story Book Figurine!  Jim Shore reimagines Fantasia in fantastic fashion in this enchanting Disney collectible. Mickey Mouse plays sorcerer as he enchants broomsticks to do chores while mentor Yen Sid watches. The complete scene rests inside the pages of a storybook.  Disney fans, don't miss your chance to add this Mickey Mouse figurine to your Disney collection today!
nodes.name: Sorcerer Mickey Story Book

nodes.description: The Star Ace Vinyl Model series has begun at last! In celebration of the 100th Anniversary of the master of movie stop motion animation, Ray Harryhausen, Star Ace is proud to release the Rhedosaurus, a vicious ancient creature unleased in the modern day.  Traditionally sculpted by the artisans of the famed creature shop of Kaibutsuya, this detailed Rhedosaurus statue is made from soft vinyl and stands 32cm tall. The Rhedosaurus comes in unpainted and unassembled model kit version of a black and white movie. This model kit will be limited edition on 400 pcs. This is the Allosaurus you've been waiting for!
nodes.name: Rhedosaurus

nodes.description: Sideshow and Brandlite are proud to present The Flash LED Mini-Poster Light!  DC Comics LED Illuminated Poster Signs bring your favorite character to life with brightly lit inkjet print, embedded in a solid slimline Acrylic (PMMA) body. The high-end posters illuminate the graphic and have a unique 'neon-style' edge glow that adds a magic atmosphere to any room in the house!  DC fans don't miss your chance to add this wall light to your home and collection today!
nodes.name: The Flash LED Mini-Poster Light

nodes.description: Sideshow and Enesco present the Sally Cat on Gravestone Figurine!  In her patchwork dress, Sally the rag doll sits atop a tombstone with a cat in this inviting piece by Jim Shore. The beloved Nightmare Before Christmas heroine is a vision of independence and compassion.   Disney fans, don't miss your chance to take home the magic of Disney collectibles this season!
nodes.name: Sally Cat on Gravestone

nodes.description: Procure a pair of Ruby Slippers without having to drop a house on a witch!  Sideshow and Paragon FX Group present these painstakingly reproduced, iconic ruby slipper props from the 1939 classic THE WIZARD OF OZ! Using the latest reference available from the film, the Smithsonian, and other sources, Paragon is pleased to bring you what we feel are the most accurate pair of ruby slippers to date.  Every gem sample, sequin sample, leather sample, and more was personally approved by our team to ensure that these slippers mimic what Dorothy would have had on her feet while taking that long walk down the yellow brick road.  It doesn't take a brain, heart, or courage to know that the Ruby Slippers are one of the most iconic props in the history of film, so order today and be among the few to own this museum-quality replica.
nodes.name: Ruby Slippers

nodes.description: 'It's not the years, honey, it's the mileage.   Sideshow and ACME Archives are pleased to present the Professor of Archeology Fine Art Lithograph by Eric Elia!  This Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark-inspired print comes hand-numbered and with a certificate of authenticity.   Indy fans and Fine Art collectors, be sure to add the Professor of Archeology print to your Indiana Jones gallery today!
nodes.name: Professor of Archeology

nodes.description: 'I'm sorry. I thought we were talking about folklore.'  Sideshow and ACME Archives are pleased to present the Expert on the Occult Fine Art Lithograph by Eric Elia!  This Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom-inspired print comes hand-numbered and with a certificate of authenticity.   Indy fans and Fine Art collectors, be sure to add the Expert on the Occult print to your Indiana Jones gallery today!
nodes.name: Expert on the Occult

nodes.description: '...So forget any ideas you've got about lost cities, exotic travel, and digging up the world. We do not follow maps to buried treasure, and 'X' never, ever marks the spot.'  Sideshow and ACME Archives are pleased to present the Obtainer of Rare Antiquities Fine Art Lithograph by Eric Elia!  This Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade-inspired print comes hand-numbered and with a certificate of authenticity.   Indy fans and Fine Art collectors, be sure to add the Obtainer of Rare Antiquities print to your Indiana Jones gallery today!
nodes.name: Obtainer of Rare Antiquities

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the fan-favorite Hulk, casting the angry brute in fine pewter, but preserving the meticulous (and slightly cartoonish) physical details. Posed with both fists clenched, Hulk is ready to SMASH!  Royal Selangor has painstakingly reproduced Hulk in fine detail, despite its miniature size. Being just over 2 inches tall, this miniature gives collectors a chance to own their very own fun-sized Hulk.  The Hulk Miniature Pewter Collectible comes boxed in a black box, emblazoned with the Marvel logo and featuring a large window for collectors that just want to keep it in mint condition.
nodes.name: Hulk Miniature

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the fan-favorite Black Panther, casting the heroic king in fine pewter, but preserving the meticulous details of his vibranium powered suit. Posed in a sturdy stance, the King of Wakanda is ever ready for battle.  Royal Selangor has painstakingly reproduced Black Panther in fine detail, despite its miniature size. Being almost 2 inches tall, this miniature gives collectors a chance to own their very own fun-sized T'challa.  The Black Panther Miniature Pewter Collectible comes boxed in a black box, emblazoned with the Marvel logo and featuring a large window for collectors that just want to keep it in mint condition.
nodes.name: Black Panther Miniature

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the web-head himself, casting Spider-Man in fine pewter. Spider-Man takes on all comers with a fist and a primed web-shooter.

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the Asgardian Prince, casting Thor in fine pewter. War-hammer Mjölnir at the ready, Thor prepares for battle.
nodes.name: Thor Miniature

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the First Avenger, casting Captain America in fine pewter. Wielding his famous shield, Captain America braces for a fight.
nodes.name: Captain America Miniature

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the genius, billionaire, playboy, philanthropist, casting Iron Man in fine pewter. Industrialist Tony Stark readies his Iron Man suit's repulsor nodes for a decisive blast.
nodes.name: Iron Man Miniature

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the fan-favorite Wolverine, casting the temperamental mutant in fine pewter at a much smaller size, but preserving the meticulous. Claws out and teeth grinding, Wolverine primes for a berserker barrage attack against his long-time nemesis Omega Red.  Royal Selangor has painstakingly reproduced Wolverine's claws, costume, and expression in fine detail, despite its miniature size. Being just over 2 inches tall, this miniature gives collectors a chance to own their very own fun-sized Logan.  The Wolverine Miniature Pewter Collectible comes boxed in a sleek black box featuring a large window for collectors that just want to keep it in mint condition.
nodes.name: Wolverine  Miniature

nodes.description: I am Groot.  Yes we know.  Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the fan-favorite Guardian, casting Groot in fine pewter, but preserving his tree-like physical details. Posed with his fist clenched, Groot is ever ready for battle.  Royal Selangor has painstakingly reproduced Groot in fine detail, despite its miniature size, giving collectors a chance to own their very fun-sized Flora Colossus.     The Groot Miniature Pewter Collectible comes boxed in a black box, emblazoned with the Marvel logo and featuring a large window for collectors that just want to keep it in mint condition.
nodes.name: Groot Miniature

nodes.description: 'Let the show begin!'  From the next-generation open-world RPG Genshin Impact, Kotobukiya is proud to present the lovely Barbara Statue!  Barbara, Deaconess of the Church of Favonius and idol of Mondstadt, comes to life in a dynamic 1:7 scale statue. Her undeniable charm has been fully and impressively recreated, complete with her loveable expression and fluttering skirt. She also comes with singing effects that have been produced with clear parts and can be removed for multiple display options!  Barbara's energetic smile is sure to bring a smile to your face as well! Add her to your collection today!
nodes.name: Barbara

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya are excited to present a 1:8 scale figure from Jujutsu Kaisen 0, Suguru Geto!  Suguru Geto from Jujutsu Kaisen 0 comes to life in a 1:8 scale figure posed in a powerful stance gripping Playful Cloud. He stands at 8.86' and is seen wearing his monk attire with black yukata robes, white tabi socks, and zori sandals.  Be sure to add this Suguru Geto Collectible Statue to Jujutsu Kaisen collection today!
nodes.name: Suguru Geto (0 Version)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya are excited to present a 1:8 scale figure from Jujutsu Kaisen 0, Satoru Gojo!  Satoru Gojo from Jujutsu Kaisen 0 comes to life in a 1:8 scale figure prepared for battle with his striking eyes peering out from underneath his bandages. The Jujutsu teacher stands at 8.86' tall and is seen wearing his all-black high-necked jacket with matching pants and dark-dressed boots. nodes.description: Gimme Some Sugar Baby!  Now you can add Ash from The Evil Dead to your Geeki Tikis® collection! The creative, colorful drinkware products combine some of the world's most-beloved Horror icons with our signature tiki-styling.  Each Geeki Tikis® mug features beautifully sculpted detailing true to the character it is paying homage to. Ash is crafted from high-quality ceramic, holds 18oz. of your favorite beverage and is top-shelf dishwasher safe and microwave safe.  Experience the aloha with every sip!
nodes.name: Ash

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present the T-Rex Sharpener!  The T-Rex's deadly teeth made mincemeat of its unfortunate prey. The ruthless king of the dinosaurs reduces pencils to mere shavings.  Dinosaur fans don't miss your chance to add purchase this dino sharpener today!
nodes.name: T-Rex Sharpener

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present the Velociraptor Letter Opener!  You might have been led to believe it's the sickle-shaped claw you should be wary of, but it's the Velociraptor's tail that means business.  Dinosaur fans don't miss your chance to add purchase this dino letter opener today!
nodes.name: Velociraptor Letter Opener

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present the Triceratops Container Pewter Collectible!  The Triceratops might seem pugnacious, but that's just outside appearances hiding a plant-eating giant and a handy compartment.  Dinosaur fans don't miss your chance to add purchase this dino container today!
nodes.name: Triceratops Container

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor present the Stegosaurus Card Holder!  Spectacular defenses, all bony plates, and prickly spikes protect calling cards as impressively as they do the herbivorous Stegosaurus.  Dinosaur fans don't miss your chance to add purchase this dino card holder today!
nodes.name: Stegosaurus Card Holder

nodes.description: Star Wars™ Chibi® Coin in Memory of this Courageous and Hopeful Leader  Our Star Wars™ Chibi® Coin Collection continues with the courageous leader, and Queen of Naboo™, Padme Amidala™.   This twelfth coin in the Star Wars series is made from 1oz of pure silver which has been shaped and colored to represent Queen Amidala. It is placed inside a specially designed case, molded to the coin's shape, for protection.   The large window in the box allows the coin to be easily displayed and includes confirmation of the coin's unique number in the limited-edition mintage of 2,000. This majestic coin for the mother to Luke and Leia is bound to be sought after. Command yours now!
nodes.name: Padmé Amidala 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Gigantic Series x DefoReal - a dream combo for any collector!  The fourth form of Godzilla (2016), the first of the DefoReal series, is making its return in a GIGANTIC way! The DefoRealversion has been completely remodeled, all while being packed with a massive amount of detail that you'd see in the Gigantic series! Enjoy this larger and more richly detailed fourth form of Godzilla (2016), made from the ground up with maximum detail by a sculpting master.   Based on the design of the first series but modified to maintain the balance one would see in a Gigantic version, this Godzilla Collectible Figure is one you don't want to miss out on!
nodes.name: Godzilla 2016 (4th Form)

nodes.description: From Dragon Ball Z, Cell First Form joins S.H.Figuarts! Options to display this anime figure include a head, hands, and a tail designed to replicate his appearance when absorbing enemies!
nodes.name: Cell First Form

nodes.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - The Batman from DC Comics The Batman! Based on original references, this polystone statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   Over the cold skyscrapers in the gloomy city of Gotham, the dark image of the Dark Knight watches the alleys, the most obscure corners, imposing fear in the hearts of the wicked on his crusade for justice and revenge. Facing the most insane criminals, corrupt public workers, and powerful mobsters, he makes use of his long training, his deductive skills, and his unshakable will to bring hope to the citizens of the city he has sworn to protect. Using a black tactical suit filled with gadgets reflecting the appearance of a big bat that represents his identity, Iron Studios proudly present the statue The Batman – Art Scale 1:10 , with the newest representation of the character in the movies, on a pedestal that reminds Gotham City's concrete buildings with Batman's symbol in the front.  In the movie The Batman, director Matt Reeves presents his vision of the Dark Knight after 10 years without a Batman solo movie. Presenting a more credible version, in a dark, rainy, and dirty Gotham City, tormented by corruption and crime, after two years of walking on the streets and instilling fear in criminals, Bruce Wayne arrives at the city's dark core. Batman, played by Robert Pattinson, with the help of his greatest ally and butler Alfred Pennyworth (Andy Serkis), is a relentless vigilante and a tireless detective that investigates together with lieutenant James Gordon, the only cop in Gotham that trusts him, a corrupt network of workers and people from the city. He faces the criminal Edward Nashton, also known as the complex, insane, and enigmatic Riddler (Paul Dano), following a trail of clues that lead the world's greatest detective to the underground, where he finds the eccentric Oswald Cobblepot, also known as Penguin (Colin Farrell) and the glamorous Catwoman (Zoe Kr
nodes.name: The Batman

nodes.description: From the smash-hit televised anime Jujutsu Kaisen, Satoru Gojo joins FiguartsZERO! Effect parts replicate his Hollow Technique Purple!  Collect this anime figure today!
nodes.name: Satoru Gojo

nodes.description: 'All it takes is one bad day to reduce the sanest man alive into a lunatic. That's how far the world is from where I am...Just one bad day. – The Joker to Batman  Prime 1 Studio is pleased to announce the latest masterwork of collaboration with legendary comic book artist Jason Fabok for our Ultimate Museum Masterline Series: The 1:3 Scale Batman vs. The Joker!  With its design, conceived by Jason Fabok, and expertly executed by Prime 1 Studio, Batman vs. The Joker is the ultimate fight brought to life between Good & Evil, Order & Chaos, Reason & Insanity!  Our talented and dedicated artists have devoted their time and efforts to create this legendary match-up. Batman's iconic look has been recreated and no detail of his costume has been left to chance. His perfect physique has been rendered with anatomical precision. His cowl, cape, gloves, and boots have been imbued with a leather-like texture. His eyes and facial expression exhibit a deep, but focused rage. His scalloped cape billows with the rushing wind as damage has been strategically added to elicit a battle-worn look. His fabled suit is completed by his finned gloves and famed utility belt.  The Joker is not to be outdone! Falling backward into a toxic vat of death, The Joker is still dapper as ever in his classic purple ensemble, wingtip shoes, and bolo tie. Hardly his first time in a chemical bath, The Joker seems the least bit concerned as he flashes Batman his trademark ghoulish smile and trains his signature long-barreled revolver on Batman's scowl!  And speaking of scowls, the Deluxe Version includes two additional swappable heads...one each for Batman and The Joker, to expand the emotional storytelling!   Excitingly, if you order your Batman vs. The Joker statue from our Prime 1 Studio Online Store and as well some of our authorized retailers. You will have access to this Deluxe Bonus Version which gets you swappable head part for The Joker!  Batman and The Joker have been at odds before, but n
nodes.name: Batman vs. The Joker (Deluxe Bonus Version)

nodes.description: 'All it takes is one bad day to reduce the sanest man alive into a lunatic. That's how far the world is from where I am...Just one bad day. – The Joker to Batman  Prime 1 Studio is pleased to announce the latest masterwork of collaboration with legendary comic book artist Jason Fabok for our Ultimate Museum Masterline Series: The 1:3 Scale Batman vs. The Joker!  With its design, conceived by Jason Fabok, and expertly executed by Prime 1 Studio, Batman vs. The Joker is the ultimate fight brought to life between Good & Evil, Order & Chaos, Reason & Insanity!  Our talented and dedicated artists have devoted their time and efforts to create this legendary match-up. Batman's iconic look has been recreated and no detail of his costume has been left to chance. His perfect physique has been rendered with anatomical precision. His cowl, cape, gloves, and boots have been imbued with a leather-like texture. His eyes and facial expression exhibit a deep, but focused rage. His scalloped cape billows with the rushing wind as damage have been strategically added to elicit a battle-worn look. His fabled suit is completed by his finned gloves and famed utility belt.  The Joker is not to be outdone! Falling backward into a toxic vat of death, The Joker is still dapper as ever in his classic purple ensemble, wingtip shoes, and bolo tie. Hardly his first time in a chemical bath, The Joker seems the least bit concerned as he flashes Batman his trademark ghoulish smile and trains his signature long-barreled revolver on Batman's scowl!  And speaking of scowls, the Deluxe Version includes two additional swappable heads...one each for Batman and The Joker, to expand the emotional storytelling!  Batman and The Joker have been at odds before, but never has it been more dangerous than this moment: unfolding over an unbelievably involved base. With caustic steam billowing from its scorching hot pipes, this dangerous chemical factory is further jeopardized by a large amount of dynamite...
nodes.name: Batman vs. The Joker (Deluxe Version)

nodes.description: 'All it takes is one bad day to reduce the sanest man alive into a lunatic. That's how far the world is from where I am...Just one bad day. – The Joker to Batman  Prime 1 Studio is pleased to announce the latest masterwork of collaboration with legendary comic book artist Jason Fabok for our Ultimate Museum Masterline Series: The 1:3 Scale Batman vs. The Joker!  With its design, conceived by Jason Fabok, and expertly executed by Prime 1 Studio, Batman vs. The Joker is the ultimate fight brought to life between Good & Evil, Order & Chaos, Reason & Insanity!  Our talented and dedicated team of artists has devoted time and effort to create this 33-inch-tall legendary match-up. Batman's iconic look has been recreated and no detail of his costume has been left to chance. His perfect physique has been rendered with anatomical precision. His cowl, cape, gloves, and boots have been imbued with a leather-like texture. His eyes and facial expression exhibit a deep, but focused rage. His scalloped cape billows with the rushing wind as damage have been strategically added to elicit a battle-worn look. His fabled suit is completed by his finned gloves and famed utility belt.  The Joker is not to be outdone! Falling backward into a toxic vat of death, The Joker is still dapper as ever in his classic purple ensemble, wingtip shoes, and bolo tie. Hardly his first time in a chemical bath, The Joker seems the least bit concerned as he flashes Batman his trademark ghoulish smile and trains his signature long-barreled revolver on Batman's scowl!  Batman and The Joker have been at odds before, but never has it been more dangerous than this moment: unfolding over an unbelievably involved base. With caustic steam billowing from its scorching hot pipes, this dangerous chemical factory is further jeopardized by a large amount of dynamite... and The Joker has the detonator! Has the Dark Knight Detective miscalculated? Or is this classic confrontation headed for an explosive conclusion
nodes.name: Batman vs. The Joker

nodes.description: Enesco's Studio Brands is the one-stop source for quality gifts and Disney collectibles licensed from the world's most innovative and desired entertainment brands while being recognized for value, craftsmanship, and authenticity. This salt and pepper set is inspired by the beloved Disney attraction where guests enter a foreboding estate and watch as the walls stretch and spirits meander. The shakers feature the black and white chamber wallpaper and perusing portraits.
nodes.name: Disney Haunted Mansion Salt and Pepper Set

nodes.description: I am not controlled by my rage anymore. I am fueled by it.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Hulk #1 Fine Art Print, a smashing new Marvel Comics art print by artist Marco Mastrazzo.  Bruce Banner and the Hulk are two sides of the same very angry coin. The Hulk has been seen as a hero, a monster, and a force of destruction throughout his tortured existence, but one thing always remains the same — his sheer strength. Artist Marco Mastrazzo captures the explosive might of the green, gamma-irradiated beast as he sends a shockwave through the earth with a slam of his fists. Power and fury radiate through the composition with artful strokes and action blurs that shake the very foundation of the image itself.  Originally created as a retailer exclusive variant cover for Hulk #1 (2021), written by Donny Cates for Marvel Comics, this comic book collectible is now available in a fine art presentation for fans. Each Hulk #1 Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. The Marvel wall art is available unframed or in a custom framed format, perfect for displaying alongside your favorite Hulk collectibles.  Unleash the full fury of Bruce Banner and bring home the Hulk #1 Fine Art Print by Marco Mastrazzo today!
nodes.name: Hulk #1

nodes.description: Time to float!   Sideshow Art Prints presents the You'll Float Too Fine Art Print, an officially licensed IT Chapter 2 art print by artist Juan Ramos.  Something has awakened deep within the sewers of Derry, Maine. Emerging 27 years after his first encounter with the Losers Club, Pennywise the Dancing Clown is once again hungry for tasty children to terrorize, salivating at the thought of their sweet screams. Based on the second half of this film saga, the illustration encapsulates generations of fear wrought by the evil entity, with spidery limbs and webs entrapping anyone who dares to seek the truth. The SS Georgie floats down the drain as Pennywise's signature red balloon reflects where the horrors all began. The entire image is rendered in searing red tones apart from the yellow of the clown's eyes — like the deadlights come to life.  Each You'll Float Too Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation with matching double mat, this horror collectible artwork is a must-have for fans of this frightening film franchise.  Hang on tight to your paper boat and bring home the You'll Float Too Fine Art Print by Juan Ramos today!
nodes.name: You'll Float Too

nodes.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present The Cult of San Reja series in the Battle for the Stars line of JoyToy collectibles and action figures. Battle for the Stars is a line of 1:18 scale, science fiction-themed action figures, and vehicles. The figures are made with exquisite detail and are highly posable to create a variety of scenes.  The Cult of San Reja introduces new aspects to the Battle for the Stars universe, featuring characters and vehicles reminiscent of chaotic sci-fi and post-apocalyptic fiction and pop culture such as Mad Max, the Chronicles of Riddick, and Borderlands. Each figure comes with a variety of accessories and weapons, perfect for creating any number of scenes where the only limit is your imagination.  Order yours today!
nodes.name: Jack

nodes.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present The Cult of San Reja series in the Battle for the Stars line of JoyToy collectibles and action figures. Battle for the Stars is a line of 1:18 scale, science fiction-themed action figures, and vehicles. The figures are made with exquisite detail and are highly posable to create a variety of scenes.  The Cult of San Reja introduces new aspects to the Battle for the Stars universe, featuring characters and vehicles reminiscent of chaotic sci-fi and post-apocalyptic fiction and pop culture such as Mad Max, the Chronicles of Riddick, and Borderlands. Each figure comes with a variety of accessories and weapons, perfect for creating any number of scenes where the only limit is your imagination.  Order yours today!
nodes.name: Neil

nodes.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present The Cult of San Reja series in the Battle for the Stars line of JoyToy collectibles and action figures. Battle for the Stars is a line of 1:18 scale, science fiction-themed action figures, and vehicles. The figures are made with exquisite detail and are highly posable to create a variety of scenes.  The Cult of San Reja introduces new aspects to the Battle for the Stars universe, featuring characters and vehicles reminiscent of chaotic sci-fi and post-apocalyptic fiction and pop culture such as Mad Max, the Chronicles of Riddick, and Borderlands. Each figure comes with a variety of accessories and weapons, perfect for creating any number of scenes where the only limit is your imagination.  Order yours today!
nodes.name: Ailie

nodes.description: Justice. The answer's Justice. - Batman  The wait is over now for The Batman! Fans can now follow the Caped Crusader who decides to embark on a life of vigilantism, strikes fear into the hearts of criminals, and brings order to the streets of Gotham City in the latest DC movie release. Sideshow and Hot Toys are bringing the heat from the latest DC movie with the new Batman Sixth Scale Collectible Figure from The Batman collection.  The screen-accurate Batman collectible figure is expertly crafted based on the appearance of Robert Pattinson as Batman/Bruce from The Batman, features a newly developed Bruce Wayne head sculpt with separate rolling eyeballs features and two styles of hair sculpture; also interchangeable lower faces techniques design; a specialized body highlighting Batman's muscular form; finely tailored Batsuit with cape and detachable diecast batarang on chest; cool Bat gadgets and highly-detailed accessories including diecast batarangs, grappling hooks, The Riddler envelope, handcuffs, and a specially designed figure stand.   Order the Batman Sixth Scale Collectible Figure to show justice among your DC collection!
nodes.name: Batman

nodes.description: I'm Vengeance. - Batman  With only a few trusted allies amongst the city's corrupt network of officials and high-profile figures, the lone vigilante has established himself as the sole embodiment of vengeance amongst his fellow citizens. The Caped Crusader in wingsuit soars above Gotham City and be on the lookout for his greatest adversaries.  With the release of The Batman movie, Sideshow and Hot Toys are excited to introduce the Batman (Deluxe Version) Sixth Scale Collectible Figure, which comes with wingsuit and accessories for integrated set-up.  Skillfully crafted based on the appearance of Robert Pattinson as Batman/Bruce Wayne in The Batman, the sixth scale Batman collectible figure features a newly developed Bruce Wayne head sculpt with separate rolling eyeballs features and two styles of hair sculpture; newly crafted Batman head sculpts with separate rolling eyeballs features, also interchangeable lower faces techniques design; a specialized body highlighting Batman's muscular form; beautifully tailored Batsuit with cape and detachable diecast batarang on chest; cool Bat gadgets and highly-detailed accessories including diecast batarangs, grappling hooks, The Riddler envelope, handcuffs, and a specially designed figure stand.   In addition, the Deluxe Version will exclusively share a few more accessories for sophisticated collectors including the wingsuit, sticky bomb gun with insertable bullet, LED light-up staircase and building décor as diorama accessories, and also includes a character backdrop.  Don't miss the chance to glide with the new Batman (Deluxe Version) Sixth Scale Collectible Figure! Add to your DC collection today!
nodes.name: Batman (Deluxe Version)

nodes.description: It's not just a call… It's a warning. - Batman  The Caped Crusader is returning to the silver screen! In DC's movie The Batman, Robert Pattinson dons the cowl and becomes Gotham City's vigilante detective and his alter ego, reclusive billionaire Bruce Wayne. The hero must forge new relationships, unmask the culprit, and bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that has long plagued Gotham City.   Celebrating the official release of DC's The Batman movie, Sideshow and Hot Toys proudly present the highly-anticipated Batman and Bat-Signal Collectible Set from The Batman collection. It's the all-in-one box that includes the awesome Bat gadgets.  Meticulously crafted based on the appearance of Robert Pattinson as Batman/Bruce Wayne in the movie, the screen-accurate Batman sixth scale figure features a newly developed Bruce Wayne head sculpt with separate rolling eyeballs features and two styles of hair sculpture; newly crafted Batman head sculpts with separate rolling eyeballs features, also interchangeable lower faces techniques design; a specialized body highlighting Batman's muscular form; beautifully tailored Batsuit with cape and detachable diecast batarang on chest; Bat gadgets including sticky bomb gun, diecast batarangs, and grappling hooks, an array of highly-detailed accessories including wingsuit for gliding scenes, The Riddler envelope, handcuffs, a specially designed figure stand with diorama accessories feature LED light-up staircase and building décor, also a themed character backdrop.  Specially crafted based on The Batman movie, the one-sixth scale Bat-Signal Collectible measures 23cm in height, displays a screen accurate design with traditional Bat symbol at the center of the signal light, specially applied with distress effects, features LED light-up function design and an adjustable stand for angled projection.   The new Batman & Bat-Signal Collectible Set will be a unique addition to your DC collection!
nodes.name: Batman and Bat-Signal

nodes.description: The iconic sign alerts evildoers that Batman lurks in the shadows to protect the streets of Gotham City: the Bat-Signal! Based on the latest DC movie release, The Batman, Sideshow and Hot Toys are thrilled to introduce the Bat-Signal Sixth Scale Figure Accessory that can project Batman's calling card on the walls.  Masterfully crafted based on The Batman movie, the Bat-Signal Sixth Scale Figure Accessory measures 23cm in height, displays a screen accurate design with traditional Bat symbol at the center of the signal light, especially applied with distress effects, features LED light-up function design and an adjustable stand for angled projection.  Reserve a spot for the Bat-Signal collection among your DC collection to call on the caped crusader whenever trouble arises!
nodes.name: Bat-Signal

nodes.description: Waking on Christmas Day in his new form, the Doctor fought the Sycorax high above London, where he lost a hand but grew a new one with remnant regenerative power. During his travels he battled Cybermen, werewolves, and possibly, the Devil itself. He defeated his nemesis the Master once more and met River Song for the first time. After a confrontation with the Time Lords, and fatally dosed with radiation, the Tenth Doctor's song ended. His violent regeneration burned the TARDIS and sent it crashing through space.  Join with us as we celebrate the 10th anniversary of the Doctor Who Sixth Scale Collection with the Definitive Series figure collection. The Tenth Doctor features two interchangeable breathtakingly realistic sculpted portraits with positionable eyes, affording collectors a greater range of posing options. The figure sports an all-new beautifully tailored detailed costume and an array of accessories for fans to create the ultimate display.
nodes.name: Tenth Doctor

nodes.description: Hugely energetic, occasionally flirtatious, and by his own admission, a mad man , the Eleventh Doctor combined youthful looks with an old soul. Crashing into the lives of Amy Pond, and her husband to be Rory, he solved the mystery of the time-erasing cracks in the universe, escaped his own death, restarted reality, and met Clara, the impossible girl. Finding his own tomb on Trenzalore he met a shameful, hidden past incarnation, sending him on a path of redemption. After sacrificing his life to defend Trenzalore, and granted a whole new cycle of incarnations by the Time Lords, the Doctor regenerated once more.  Join us as we celebrate the 10th anniversary of the Doctor Who Sixth Scale Collection with the Definitive Series figure collection. The Eleventh Doctor features two interchangeable breathtakingly realistic sculpted portraits with positionable eyes, affording collectors a greater range of posing options. The figure sports an all-new beautifully tailored detailed costume and an array of accessories for fans to create the ultimate display.
nodes.name: Eleventh Doctor

nodes.description: A new Doctor with a sharp face, bushy brows and boggle eyes faced a bewildered Clara, across the console. Clara and the Time Lord were inseparable, teaming up with UNIT's Kate Stewart and Osgood to fight off the Zygons, Davros and the Master, now Missy. After enjoying a few years off from saving the universe, the Twelfth Doctor took on a teaching position where he met the inquisitive Bill Potts. After a fierce battle with Mondasian Cybermen which prompted regeneration, the Doctor was able to fight it off long enough to meet the First Doctor.  Join us as we celebrate the 10th anniversary of the Doctor Who Sixth Scale Collection with the Definitive Series figure collection. The Twelfth Doctor features two interchangeable breathtakingly realistic sculpted portraits with positionable eyes, affording collectors a greater range of posing options. The figure sports an all-new beautifully tailored detailed costume and an array of accessories for fans to create the ultimate display.
nodes.name: Twelfth Doctor

nodes.description: Sideshow and Ella Superstarr are proud to present the Lou Lou La Grande (Extravaganza) Doll.   The smarty Lou Lou is an heiress of the luxury department store  Le Grand in Paris, France. She is a famous designer and has a successful fashion brand called Lou Collection.  Seen wearing a light blue jacket, lace crop top, and frilled midi tulle skirt, Lou Lou's look is accentuated with a gold buckle belt and light blue clasp heels with a shimmery bag.  Don't miss your chance to add Lou Lou La Grande to your collection!
nodes.name: Lou Lou La Grande (Extravaganza)

nodes.description: The Disney Traditions collection by Jim Shore combines the magic of Disney with the time-honored motifs of handcrafted folk art. Sitting atop a tombstone, Jack Skellington has a To Be Or Not To Be moment with a jack-o-lantern. Eye to eye, he holds a pumpkin much like a skull and contemplates all things Halloween. This Jim Shore designed Disney collectible boasts patchwork details and endless charm.
nodes.name: Jack on Gravestone

nodes.description: The sole survivor of the Last Great Time War, the Ninth Doctor was an intense and emotional incarnation. Hiding his psychological trauma behind madcap wit and frivolity, he took Rose Tyler to see the end of the world, inspired Charles Dickens, and showed that for once, everybody could live. After Rose defeated the Daleks using the power of the time vortex, the Doctor saved her by transferring that dangerous power into his own body. The strain destroyed his every cell and as Rose watched, his body exploded with raging energy.  Join us as we celebrate the 10th anniversary of the Doctor Who Sixth Scale Collection with the Definitive Series figure collection. The Ninth Doctor features two interchangeable breathtakingly realistic sculpted portraits with positionable eyes, affording collectors a greater range of posing options. The figure sports an all-new beautifully tailored detailed costume and an array of accessories for fans to create the ultimate display.
nodes.name: Ninth Doctor

nodes.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present The Cult of San Reja series in the Battle for the Stars line of JoyToy collectibles and action figures. Battle for the Stars is a line of 1:18 scale, science fiction-themed action figures, and vehicles. The figures are made with exquisite detail and are highly posable to create a variety of scenes.  The Cult of San Reja introduces new aspects to the Battle for the Stars universe, featuring characters and vehicles reminiscent of chaotic sci-fi and post-apocalyptic fiction and pop culture such as Mad Max, the Chronicles of Riddick, and Borderlands. The motorcycle presented here is a mix of form and wild, dangerous function.  Order yours today!
nodes.name: Harvey B19

nodes.description: The Disney Traditions collection by Jim Shore combines the magic of Disney collectibles with the time-honored motifs of handcrafted folk art. Celebrating the 20th anniversary of Lilo and Stitch, this darling duo team up for a tiki-lit hula. Lilo dances in her Hawaiian leafed dress and crown while Stitch plucks ukulele chords. Together the precious pair remind us of the meaning of Ohana.
nodes.name: Lilo and Stitch

nodes.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are excited to present the Prop Size Jack Skellington Vinyl Collectible!  The faithful reproduction of Jack Skellington stands at approximately 17.71' and comes with 12 replaceable facial parts so various facial expressions can be reproduced.  He also comes in a luxurious coffin box. Disney collectibles fans, don't miss your chance to add this Jack Skellington Figure to your Nightmare Before Christmas collection today!
nodes.name: Jack Skellington

nodes.description: Disney Showcase Collection brings your favorite Disney characters and cinematic moments to life as never before. Our Disney dedicated employees, work with talented Disney artists, sculptors and painters to create intricately detailed Disney collectibles coveted by Disney enthusiasts around the world. The official chalice of Halloween Town, celebrate your holidays in style with this stainless steel lined decorative goblet adorned with frightful imagery from The Nightmare Before Christmas. 16 faux gems sparkle in the moonlight.
nodes.name: Nightmare Before Christmas Chalice

nodes.description: Celebrate your loyalty to the famed Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, the setting for Harry Potter and fellow magical students, with this impressive and sturdy officially licensed decorative, collectible goblet. Cast in the finest stone resin and all hand-painted, this sculpted goblet includes a stainless-steel insert with wide lip as well as accents of faceted clear faux gemstones.  The Hogwarts School was founded by four Houses, each of which is represented with a symbol in the sculpted bas relief Hogwarts heraldic emblem featured on all panels of this goblet. Gryffindor House (to which Harry Potter belongs) was founded by Godric Gryffindor and is represented by the Lion in the fire colors of red and gold. Gryffindor members are considered brave and daring. Slytherin House (to which Draco Malfoy belongs) was founded by Salazar Slytherin and is represented by the Serpent in water colors of green and silver. Slytherin members are considered cunning and ambitious. Ravenclaw House (to which Luna Lovegood belongs) was founded by Rowena Ravenclaw and is represented by the Eagle in air colors of blue and bronze. Ravenclaw members are said to be wise and intellectual. Hufflepuff House (to which Cedric Diggory belongs) was founded by Helga Hufflepuff and is represented by the Badger in earth colors of yellow and black. Hufflepuff members are considered loyal and hard-working.  The motto for The Hogwarts School, sculpted onto the banner at the bottom of the emblem, reads: Draco Dormiens Nunquam Titillandus , which translated from Latin language, says: 'Never tickle a sleeping dragon'. The goblet includes a stainless-steel inserted cup holding approximately 10 oz. The stainless-steel cup may be cleaned carefully by hand without exposing the stone resin to any liquids. Celebrate your school spirit with this goblet representing the pinnacle of magical learning and add it to your Harry Potter collectibles display today.
nodes.name: Hogwarts Decorative Goblet

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are proud to present two of the galaxy's baddest, the Sidious & Vader King & Queen Chess Piece Pair!  Darth Sidious, the master masquerading as Supreme Chancellor, then as Emperor, and Vader, the apprentice lured, as a troubled youth, inexorably to the Dark Side that unites the Sith.  Star Wars fans, and those who love a good game of chess, be sure to add Sidious & Vader to your collection today!
nodes.name: Sidious & Vader King & Queen Chess Piece Pair

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are proud to present everyone's favorite droids, the R2-D2 & C-3PO Knight Chess Piece Pair!  A classic comedic pairing, the deadpan humour of the rotund astromech often sets off the lanky protocol droid's tetchy nature, even as they work together to save the galaxy.  Star Wars fans, and those who love a good game of chess, be sure to add R2-D2 & C-3PO to your collection today!
nodes.name: R2-D2 & C-3PO Knight Chess Piece Pair

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are proud to present the galaxy's favorite buddies, the Han Solo & Chewbacca Bishop Chess Piece Pair!  Loyalty, trust, the occasional bickering; ample demonstrations of the singular and long-lasting friendship between human and Wookiee. The shared command of the second-fastest ship in the galaxy doesn't hurt either.  Star Wars fans, and those who love a good game of chess, be sure to add Han & Chewie to your collection today!
nodes.name: Han Solo & Chewbacca Bishop Chess Piece Pair

nodes.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are proud to present a chess pair that is definitely strong with the Force, the Luke & Leia King & Queen Chess Piece Pair!  To conceal their existence from their father Darth Vader, twins Luke Skywalker and Leia Organa are separated at birth. Reunited, they become lynchpins in the rebellion against the Empire.  Star Wars fans, and those who love a good game of chess, be sure to add Luke & Leia to your collection today!
nodes.name: Luke & Leia King & Queen Chess Piece Pair

nodes.description: I'll eat something sweet after I take care of this.   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Wedding Chun-Li: Season Pass 1:4 Scale Statue, coming down the aisle to join your lineup of Street Fighter collectibles.  Here comes the bride — ready for battle! The Wedding Dress Chun-Li Statue measures 15.5 tall and 9 wide as the iconic Street Fighter heroine stands on a wood-like floor dotted with pink flower petals. The gorgeous white wedding gown emphasizes her gracefulness and athletic physique as Chun-Li slips the garter from her leg ahead of a fight.  Inspired by the Street Fighter V DLC alternate costume, the Wedding Dress Chun-Li Statue faithfully recreates her in-game character model as a beautiful, three-dimensional video game collectible. Her costume is fully sculpted and features detailed textures to mimic dynamic fabric movement and lace-like elements. Chun-Li's wedding dress is also decorated with clusters of roses, and two sheer sculpted ribbons add a touch of elegance to her signature hair buns. The ensemble is finished with jewelry accents including earrings, a necklace, and anklets. Dressed to impress, Chun-Li is sure to stun — in more ways than one — when paired alongside your other video game collectibles.  The Exclusive Edition of the Wedding Chun-Li: Season Pass 1:4 Scale Statue also includes a collectible art print measuring 11x17 by artist Edwin Huang, making a perfect display pairing for the Street Fighter statue.  Tie the knot in your collection and bring home the Wedding Chun-Li: Season Pass 1:4 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today!
nodes.name: Wedding Chun-Li

nodes.description: Can I Be a Mongoose Dog?  Generally spouting more nonsense than not, GIR of Nickelodeon's Invader Zim, is Zim's happy-go-lucky robotic assistant. Truth be told, GIR is often one of the many reasons Zim's plans fail so spectacularly.   Our 8-inch tall GIR Zippermouth™ Premium Plush features his green mongoose-dog disguise that can be unzipped to expose his true robot form, including large teal eyes and posable antenna. Unzip his mouth, and his robot tongue is revealed.  Like all of our Zippermouths™, GIR is a sculptural plush. He's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold his shape no matter how hyperactive he gets.  Pair him up with his incompetent Irken friend, our Zim Zippermouth™. But be advised, they are likely plotting world domination.
nodes.name: GIR Zippermouth

nodes.description: I'll settle this here and now!   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Wedding Chun-Li – Player 2: Season Pass 1:4 Scale Statue, coming down the aisle to join your lineup of Street Fighter collectibles.  Here comes the blushing bride — ready for battle! The Wedding Dress Chun-Li – Player 2 Statue measures 15.5 tall and 9 wide as the iconic Street Fighter heroine stands on a wood-like floor dotted with pink flower petals. The striking black and red gradient wedding gown emphasizes her gracefulness and athletic physique as Chun-Li slips the garter from her leg ahead of a fight.  Inspired by the Street Fighter V DLC alternate costume, the Wedding Dress Chun-Li – Player 2 Statue faithfully recreates her in-game character model as a beautiful, three-dimensional video game collectible. Her Player 2 costume is fully sculpted and features detailed textures to mimic dynamic fabric movement and lace-like elements. Chun-Li's two-toned wedding dress is also decorated with clusters of roses, and two sheer sculpted ribbons add a touch of elegance to her signature hair buns. The ensemble is finished with jewelry accents including earrings, a necklace, and anklets. Dressed to impress, Chun-Li is sure to stun — in more ways than one — when paired alongside your other video game collectibles.  The Exclusive Edition of the Wedding Chun-Li – Player 2: Season Pass 1:4 Scale Statue also includes a collectible art print measuring 11x17 by artist Edwin Huang, making a perfect display pairing for the Street Fighter statue.  Make it the happiest day of your collection and bring home the Wedding Chun-Li – Player 2: Season Pass 1:4 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today!
nodes.name: Wedding Chun-Li: Player 2

nodes.description: Why Don't You Bow Down To Me or Something?  Irkens are expected to be unwaveringly loyal to the Empire, but Zim of Nickelodeon's Invader Zim, is loyal to the point of absurdity. A narcissist and megalomaniac, he is blind to his many, many failures.   Our 10-inch tall Zim Zippermouth™ Premium Plush features his green Irk skin and the standard-issue Invader uniform: a striped red tunic with pink collar and sleeves, as well as black leggings, boots, and gloves. Pay special attention to the position of his antennae because they only droop while he schmoops . Unzip his mouth, and a worm-like tongue is revealed.  Like all of our Zippermouths™, Zim is a sculptural plush. He's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold his shape no matter what self-inflicted disaster awaits him.  Pair him up with his disguised robot companion, our Gir Zippermouth™. But be advised, they are likely plotting the end of human civilization as we know it.
nodes.name: Zim Zippermouth

nodes.description: Burdened with Glorious Cuteness  Alligator Loki of Marvel Studios' Disney+ series Loki may look like a carnivorous reptile - which he definitely is - but he's also an intelligent variant of the God of Mischief himself.   Our 12-inch long Alligator Loki Zippermouth™ Premium Plush features his green scales and iconic gold crown. Unzip the God of Mischief's mouth, and a presidential Loki button is exposed. Wonder where he got that?  Like all of our Zippermouths™, Alligator Loki is a sculptural plush. He's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold his shape no matter how many neighborhood cats he eats.
nodes.name: Alligator Loki Zippermouth

nodes.description: Sideshow and Medicom are excited to present a life-size version of Woody from Disney's Toy Story!  This Woody figure stands at approximately 15.15' tall and comes with replaceable facial parts that have movable eyes so various facial expressions can be reproduced.  Disney fans don't miss your chance to add this Ultimate Woody Figure to your Disney collectibles display today!
nodes.name: Ultimate Woody

nodes.description: Disney Showcase Collection brings your favorite Disney characters and cinematic moments to life as never before. Our Disney dedicated employees, work with talented Disney artists, sculptors and painters to create intricately detailed Disney collectibles coveted by Disney enthusiasts around the world. This magnificent Maleficent chalice is inspired by Walt Disney's 1959 animated film, Sleeping Beauty. With dazzling detail and creative draftsmanship, this unique collectible highlights the magic and majesty of the Mistress of Evil.
nodes.name: Maleficent Chalice

nodes.description: Bring home the Bounty!  The latest addition in our line-up of Geeki Tikis® Scenic Mugs is for the famed bounty hunter Boba Fett.   This creative and colorful Star Wars The Book of Boba Fett 24 oz. Scenic Geeki Tikis® Mug features a wraparound scenic design bursting with characters and imagery from the new Disney+ series.  You'll spot an array of characters and iconic elements, thanks to the 360-degree storytelling. Complete with Star Wars iconography and Aurebesh lettering, it also incorporates elements of our signature tiki-styling, making this no ordinary drinkware.  This high-quality, durable, stoneware-ceramic, 8-inch tall mug is also a limited edition of only 1,500 pieces.  Experience the aloha with every sip, and May the Force be with you!
nodes.name: The Book of Boba Fett Scenic Mug

nodes.description: Sideshow and Vannen are excited to present The Hydrogen Atom Watch from Vannen!  It is limited to 35 pieces and features glossy and matte dial art, and the Hydrogen atom symbol printed on the inside the surface of the crystal. Each matte blue watch also comes packaged in a custom Hydrogen atom sleeve.  Don't miss your chance to add this Hydrogen Atom Watch to your wardrobe today!
nodes.name: Hydrogen Atom Watch

nodes.description: In contrast to the Empire's stormtrooper, the elite death trooper's dark armor leaves no doubt as to the nature of their assignments. Serving as bodyguards to high-ranking Imperial officers, the death trooper is also trained in sniping and clandestine commando missions. From the on-body arsenal of gadgets to the exacting geometry of the helmet, fine detailing brings the chillingly efficient Imperial soldier to life.  The Death Trooper Figurine Pewter Collectible stands at approximately 6.1 inches tall.
nodes.name: Death Trooper Figurine

nodes.description: Super7's latest wave of Disney ULTIMATES! presented by Sideshow has a little something for everyone! With Ben AliGator from Disney's Fantasia, Stitch from Disney's Lilo & Stitch, Disney Silly Symphony's The Big Bad Wolf, and The Queen of Hearts from Disney's Alice in Wonderland, there's an ULTIMATES! figure for fans of vintage shorts, animated classics, and beloved modern movies! These 7' scale highly-articulated, made-to-order figures come with interchangeable parts and additional must-have accessories, making them the ultimate collectible for any Disney fan!  He may be more United Galactic Federation fugitive than shelter dog, but Lilo knows that whatever he is, Stitch is good. This 7 scale ULTIMATES! figure of Stitch from Disney's Lilo & Stitch includes multiple interchangeable heads & hands as well as a variety of accessories suitable for Experiment 626's zany hijinks! No one gets left behind in this family, so don't forget to make the made-to-order Disney ULTIMATES! figure of Stitch part of your Ohana before Captain Gantu tries to take him away!
nodes.name: Stitch

nodes.description: The turn to the dark side continues with XXRAY Plus treatment of the corrupted Princess Celestia - Daybreaker!  The powerful XXRAY Plus: Daybreaker is captured in perfect detail. Her semi-translucent orange mane flows with glitter and mimics the intensity of a raging fire billowing in the wind. Metallic detailing adorns the XXRAY Plus: Daybreaker, who is depicted with a malevolent glare and evil grin. Dissected in Jason Freeny's iconic dissection style, XXRAY Plus: Daybreaker reveals a secret that lies within her heart!  She's the better, prettier and more powerful version of Princess Celestia.....are you ready for the XXRAY Plus: Daybreaker to take over your collection?
nodes.name: XXRAY Plus: Daybreaker

nodes.description: Garland from STRANGER OF PARADISE FINAL FANTASY ORIGIN comes to the PLAY ARTS Kai line!  Wrapped entirely in deep black armor and a fearsome helmet, this figure is an ominous yet dignified portrayal of the character. Each detail was given great intention, from the delicate design elements seen throughout the armor, to the surface of his large sword. The fabric cloak includes wires, allowing for dynamic posing. The shoulders and waist make use of a dedicated joint structure, enabling smooth articulation even with his complex form. Included are an enormous sword— as tall as the figure itself— heightening Garland's imposing presence, as well as expressive hands that allow you to recreate poses from right out of the game.  The figure includes a display stand.
nodes.name: Jack Garland

nodes.description: 2B (YoRHa No. 2 Type B) from NieR: Automata is now an Action Doll. With movable joints and the ability to stand on her own, be it on your desk or on a shelf!  She can easily recreate some of her most iconic poses with a wide range of movement and expressiveness provided by all the small details from the lace used on her sleeves to the embroidery on her skirt.
nodes.name: 2B YoRHa No. 2 Type B

nodes.description: 'My name is Megumin! The arch-wizard who casts the powerful Explosion spell!'  Pop-Up Parade is a series of figures that are easy to collect with affordable prices and speedy releases! Each figure typically stands around 17-18cm in height and the series features a vast selection of characters from popular anime and game series, with many more to be added soon!  Pop-Up Parade Megumin from the movie 'KONO SUBARASHII SEKAI NI SYUKUFUKU WO! LEGEND OF CRIMSON' is being rereleased! She's been recreated in a cute, confident pose with a smug look on her face and her hat is also removable!  Be sure to add her to your collection today!
nodes.name: Pop Up Parade Megumin

nodes.description: Super7's latest wave of Disney ULTIMATES! presented by Sideshow has a little something for everyone! With Ben AliGator from Disney's Fantasia, Stitch from Disney's Lilo & Stitch, Disney Silly Symphony's The Big Bad Wolf, and The Queen of Hearts from Disney's Alice in Wonderland, there's an ULTIMATES! figure for fans of vintage shorts, animated classics, and beloved modern movies! These 7' scale highly-articulated, made-to-order figures come with interchangeable parts and additional must-have accessories, making them the ultimate collectible for any Disney fan!  Your eyes do not deceive you! Those eyes, nose, and mouth are WAY too big to be Grandma's. This 7 scale, highly articulated, intricately designed ULTIMATES! figure of The Big Bad Wolf from Disney Silly Symphony's The Big Bad Wolf includes multiple interchangeable heads & hands as well as his Grandma disguise. It doesn't matter if your house is made of straw, sticks, bricks, or whatever, this made-to-order Disney ULTIMATES! figure of The Big Bad Wolf will be right at home in your collection!
nodes.name: Big Bad Wolf
